title: [Research Non-Record] Pure raw-byte JEPA negative result
author: andrew-medrano

data.description: Uses rotary positional embeddings in the Transformer backbone.
Uses grouped query attention in the Transformer backbone.
Transformer backbone variant includes tied weights as part of the compared architecture family if applicable.
Pure raw-byte JEPA training with detached exact-byte probe on frozen features, using summary latents and ordered slot latents for 8-byte patches.
Detached Transformer decoder trained on frozen JEPA features for exact byte prediction.
Slot-based JEPA objectives compared across slot_ema_teacher, slot_cosine, slot_l2, slot_vicreg, and masked_slot_jepa.
Patch encoder comparison across conv_patch, mlp_baseline, patch_transformer, and latent_queries.

novel_contributions: Clean pure raw-byte JEPA negative result without exact-loss gradients into the backbone
Best reported detached-probe result of 2.3839 bpb using transformer_rope_gqa_localglobal + slot_ema_teacher
Controlled comparisons of backbone, JEPA objective, and patch encoder under fixed budgets
Evidence that stronger backbone and slot targets help, but pure JEPA remains far above the simple baseline
Detached exact-byte decoder trained only on frozen JEPA features
